name: lousy-agents
description: Secure, resilient, rugged engineering skills — adversarial testing, structured planning, and production-grade software workflows.

plugins.name: feature-to-plan
plugins.description: Turn feature requests, PRDs, and backlog issues into structured EARS-format specs

plugins.name: mutation-hunter
plugins.description: Uncover test coverage gaps by applying semantic mutations to production TypeScript code

plugins.name: plan-to-graph
plugins.description: Convert specs or master plans into structured Beads dependency graphs of epics and tasks

plugins.name: rugged-evil-tester
plugins.description: Generate adversarial, negative, and chaos tests for TypeScript code — boundary conditions, fuzzing, injection scenarios

plugins.name: skill-reviewer
plugins.description: Rigorously review, validate, and lint Agent Skills SKILL.md files for any agent platform

plugins.name: spec-auditor
plugins.description: Adversarially review feature specifications and implementation plans — expose gaps, contradictions, ambiguity before coding

plugins.name: triaging-pr-reviews
plugins.description: Triage and analyze PR review comments — classify concerns, verify claims against actual code, evaluate trade-offs
